# OpenResiApp

> Open-source web application for managing Slovak housing associations (bytove spolocenstva). Compliant with Slovak Act No. 182/1993 Z.z.

## What is OpenResiApp?

OpenResiApp is a free, open-source application for managing residential apartment buildings in Slovakia. It provides electronic voting, a bulletin board, owner management, mandate delegation, and automatic PDF minutes generation — all compliant with Slovak Act No. 182/1993 on Ownership of Apartments.

## Key Features

- Weighted electronic voting (by ownership share, by flat, by area)
- Three quorum types (majority of present, all owners, 2/3 of all)
- Written voting (per rollam) and meeting voting with paper ballots
- Mandate delegation with certified signatures (no chain delegation)
- Bulletin board with announcements, events, maintenance notices
- Multiple entrances per association
- Automatic PDF minutes with audit log and QR code
- SHA-256 audit trail for every vote with email confirmation
- Five user roles: Admin, Owner, Tenant, Vote Counter, Caretaker
- Multilingual: Slovak and English

## Tech Stack

Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL 16, NextAuth v5, Docker, Caddy (HTTPS), Nodemailer, next-intl, react-pdf.

## Two Ways to Use

### 1. Self-Hosted (Free)
Install on your own server using Docker. Full features, MIT license.
- Docker image: ipk0/open-resiapp on Docker Hub
- Supports linux/amd64 and linux/arm64
- Automated setup script available
- GitHub: https://github.com/open-resiapp/open-resiapp

### 2. Managed Cloud (Paid)
Hosted at https://cloud.open-resi.app — no server setup needed.
- Same application, zero maintenance
- Automatic daily backups, SSL, data isolation
- Each instance runs in its own isolated container with separate database
- 7-day free trial, no credit card required

#### Cloud Pricing (per instance, volume discounts)
| Instances | Price per instance |
|-----------|-------------------|
| 1         | 7 EUR/month       |
| 2-3       | 6 EUR/month       |
| 4-5       | 5 EUR/month       |
| 6+        | 4 EUR/month       |

## Legal Compliance (Slovak Law)

The voting module implements requirements from Slovak Act No. 182/1993 Z.z.:
- § 14a(1-2): Written voting and meeting voting
- § 14a(4): Mandates with certified signatures, no chain delegation
- § 14b(1-2): Three quorum types
- § 14(2): Three voting methods (share, flat, area)
- § 14b(5): Quarter of owners can initiate a vote
- Audit trail with SHA-256 hashes and email confirmations
- Tenants cannot vote (read-only access)
